framework.name: Platform Strategy: Commoditize Complementary Layers
framework.description: OpenAI is building the agent creation infrastructure (picks and shovels) rather than specific agent solutions. This commoditizes the agent-building layer, pushing value to specialized domains, proprietary data, or orchestration services that sit above the infrastructure.
framework.raw_quote: Not explicitly stated, but implied by the entire demo — OpenAI is providing the tooling, not the solutions.

source.title: NEW ChatGPT Agent Builder: From Zero to Automation Hero (2026 Guide)
